hooks.statusMessage: Checking markdown before git commit or gh body submission
hooks.command:
/usr/bin/env ruby -rjson -rtmpdir -rshellwords -rtempfile -e 'payload = JSON.parse(STDIN.read) rescue {}; command = payload.dig("tool_input", "command").to_s; argv = Shellwords.split(command) rescue []; argv = if %w[bash sh zsh].include?(argv[0]) && (idx = argv.index("-lc") || argv.index("-c")); begin Shellwords.split(argv[idx + 1].to_s) rescue argv end else argv end; repo_root = `git rev-parse --show-toplevel`.strip; Dir.mktmpdir("codex-mdl-style-") do |style_dir|; style_path = File.join(style_dir, ".mdl_style.rb"); rules = `mdl --list-rules`.lines.map { |line| line[/^MD\d+/] }.compact; rules -= %w[MD004 MD007]; File.write(style_path, "all
" + rules.map { |rule| "exclude_rule '''#{rule}'''" }.join("
") + "
rule '''MD004''', :style => '''asterisk'''
rule '''MD007''', :indent => 4
"); lint_text = lambda do |text|; Tempfile.create(["codex-mdl-body", ".md"], style_dir) do |tmp|; tmp.write(text); tmp.flush; system("mdl", tmp.path, chdir: style_dir); end; end; deny = lambda do |reason|; puts JSON.generate({"hookSpecificOutput" => {"hookEventName" => "PreToolUse", "permissionDecision" => "deny", "permissionDecisionReason" => reason}}); exit 0; end; if argv[0] == "git" && argv[1] == "commit"; files = `git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACMRT`.lines.map(&:chomp).grep(/\.md$/); exit 0 if files.empty?; failed = files.any? do |file|; abs = File.join(repo_root, file); !system("mdl", abs, chdir: style_dir); end; deny.call("markdown lint failed for staged markdown files") if failed; elsif argv[0] == "gh" && %w[pr issue].include?(argv[1]); subcommand = argv[2].to_s; if %w[comment edit].include?(subcommand); body = nil; body_source = nil; i = 3; while i < argv.length; token = argv[i]; case token; when "--editor", "-e", "--web", "-w"; deny.call("use --body or --body-file with gh so Codex can lint the Markdown before posting"); when "--body", "-b"; body = argv[i + 1].to_s; body_source = :inline; i += 1; when "--body-file", "-F"; path = argv[i + 1].to_s; body_source = :file; if path == "-"; deny.call("use --body or a real --body-file path; gh --body-file - hides the Markdown from Codex linting"); elsif File.file?(path); body = File.read(path); else; deny.call("cannot read gh body file"); end; i += 1; end; i += 1; end; if subcommand == "comment" && body_source.nil?; deny.call("use --body or --body-file so Codex can lint the Markdown before posting"); end; if body_source && !lint_text.call(body.to_s); deny.call("markdown lint failed for gh body"); end; end; end; end'
